title: Paper corpus retrieval QA gold set
intended_use: Preflight regression test for an AI/RAG reader over the committed LOB paper corpus.

design.unit_of_analysis: one English question with one target paper and one or more answer-bearing PDF pages
design.sampling: census of all 22 papers, stratified into formula, method, and result questions
known_limitations: The set was curated by one reviewer and does not measure inter-annotator agreement.
Questions use terminology present in or closely paraphrased from the papers; multilingual and adversarial queries are out of scope.
A page hit establishes answer-bearing context, not answer synthesis correctness.

adjudication.procedure: Draft failures were reviewed against rendered source-PDF pages. Multi-part or corpus-ambiguous questions were rewritten as atomic, paper-identifiable questions without changing their substantive answer targets.

retriever.name: field_aware_bm25_phrase_v1
retriever.description: Deterministic dependency-free BM25 over chunk text with repeated title/heading fields and an exact normalized phrase bonus.

queries.question: How is the volume-weighted micro-price defined from best bid and ask prices and queue imbalance?
How does DeepLOB combine convolutional filters, an Inception module, and an LSTM for limit order book prediction?
In DeepLOB, what accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 results are reported on FI-2010 for prediction horizons k=10, 20, 50, and 100?
What Z-score normalization equation is specified in the FI-2010 benchmark experimental protocol?
How are anchored cross-validation, normalization, prediction horizons, and labels organized in the FI-2010 experimental protocol?
How do ridge regression and the SLFN nonlinear baseline perform on the benchmark dataset?
In the one-tick-ahead queue imbalance predictor, how is I(t) defined from the best bid and best ask queue sizes?
How does the one-tick-ahead queue imbalance study construct each sample by choosing a random time between consecutive mid-price changes?
What predictive power and local logistic regression results are reported for queue imbalance?
What is the tail probability of the duration until the next price change when the two queues start at x and y?
How does the Markovian level-one order book model represent bid and ask queue dynamics, cancellations, and market orders?
What diffusion limit is derived for the price process and how is it tested on high-frequency data?
How is order flow imbalance OFI aggregated from individual order book events over a time interval?
What TAQ sample, 10-second time grid, and half-hour ordinary least squares regressions are used to estimate the order-flow-imbalance price-impact coefficient?
Why does order flow imbalance explain price changes better than trade imbalance or total volume, including the square-root volume relation?
How is realized volatility computed from successive mid-prices in the stochastic order book model?
How are limit order arrival, market order, and cancellation rates specified and estimated in the continuous-time Markov chain order book?
What long-run behavior and conditional price-move and execution probabilities are reported by the stochastic order book model?
How is a Bernoulli dropout mask applied to every input in a recurrent limit order book sequence?
How is a fixed-length limit order book sequence classified with a recurrent neural network and predictor selection?
What sequence classification results and F1 scores are obtained for next limit order book price movement?
What relation connects the Hurst exponent H to the power-law autocorrelation exponent alpha for long-memory order flow?
In the Limit order books survey, how are b(t), a(t), bid-relative and ask-relative price, and depth n at price p defined?
What empirical stylized facts are documented for order size, relative price, cancellations, impact, heavy tails, and long memory in order flow?
What polynomial kernel maps limit order book features into the SVM feature space?
How are basic, time-insensitive, and time-sensitive limit order book features extracted and used to train the SVM?
What feature-selection, significance-test, processing-time, and simple trading strategy results are reported for the SVM model?
How is gated axial attention computed using query, key, value, relative positions, and learned gates?
How does Axial-LOB alternate attention along time and order book feature axes and calibrate the model on FI-2010?
How does Axial-LOB perform on FI-2010 and under temporal and feature input permutation tests?
How is the DAIN adaptive gating vector gamma computed with a sigmoid from the normalized sequence mean?
How do the adaptive shifting, scaling, and gating layers in Deep Adaptive Input Normalization transform each time series?
What forecasting improvements does DAIN report on the energy, air quality, and FI-2010 financial datasets?
How are upward, downward, and stationary stock price trend labels defined using future average mid-price and threshold theta?
How does the LOBCAST framework benchmark deep learning models across FI-2010 and proprietary stock datasets?
What performance, robustness, and cross-market generalizability findings are reported in the LOB benchmark study?
How does the spatial neural network model the conditional probability of an integer-valued price change at location y?
How are spatial neural network architectures constructed to model joint high-dimensional limit order book price distributions?
What out-of-sample likelihood and tail accuracy results are reported for fixed-time and next-price-change horizons?
What equations define token-mixing and channel-mixing MLP blocks with residual connections and LayerNorm?
How does MLP-Mixer process image patches using only token-mixing and channel-mixing multilayer perceptrons?
How does MLP-Mixer accuracy change with model scale and pre-training dataset size on ImageNet and JFT?
How does Bilinear Input Normalization combine row-wise and column-wise normalized matrices with learned lambda weights?
How does BiN learn adaptive shifting, scaling, and gating along both dimensions of bilinear financial time series?
What FI-2010 improvements are reported when BiN is applied to TABL and compared with batch normalization?
How does TABL compute temporal attention weights and combine the attended bilinear representation through lambda?
How is the Temporal Attention augmented Bilinear network built and configured for high-frequency limit order data?
What accuracy, precision, recall, F1, and forward and backward computation times are reported for C(TABL) on FI-2010?
In Forecasting Stock Prices from the Limit Order Book using CNNs, how are three movement labels defined from backward and forward average mid-prices?
What convolutional neural network architecture and training loss are used to forecast stock prices from limit order book tensors?
In Forecasting Stock Prices from the Limit Order Book using CNNs, what recall, precision, F1, and Cohen kappa results are reported against SVM and MLP baselines?
How are stationary relative price and accumulated volume features constructed from limit order book levels?
How are CNN, LSTM, and combined CNN-LSTM models trained on stationary limit order book features?
What experimental results show the effect of stationary features on price prediction across forecasting horizons?
What is the scaled dot-product attention equation using query, key, value, and square root of key dimension?
How are Transformer encoder and decoder stacks built from multi-head self-attention, feed-forward layers, residual connections, and positional encoding?
What BLEU, training cost, model variation, and constituency parsing results are reported for the Transformer?
How are the context vector and attention weights computed for multi-horizon sequence-to-sequence limit order book forecasting?
How does the encoder-decoder attention architecture jointly forecast multiple limit order book horizons?
What FI-2010, LSE transfer-learning, and IPU versus GPU acceleration results are reported for multi-horizon forecasting?
In Universal features of price formation, what recurrent state equation maps order book input and previous hidden state to next-price-move output?
How is a deep recurrent model trained on billions of order book observations across hundreds of stocks to learn price formation?
What evidence supports universality across assets, stationarity, and path dependence in learned price formation?
What residual row-mixing and column-mixing equations define the MLPLOB block?
How does TLOB use alternating dual attention across time and feature dimensions after bilinear normalization?
What results does TLOB report on FI-2010, Tesla and Intel stocks, Bitcoin, and its ablation study?
